clusters.excerpt_en: Dozens of others are feared dead as crews scour for bodies after the vessel sank on its way to a gold-mining outpost in the South American country.

articles.title: At Least 27 Dead in Guyana After Ferry Capsizes
Guyana launches criminal probe as crews scour waters for survivors after ferry capsizes
